strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear mirror karna ki weak dikhne ka darr central hai.
text: Andar ka darr yeh hai ki agar dard dikh gaya toh log tumhe kamzor samjhenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ghabrahat bhi bahut badh jati hai jab koi mazak karta hai. Phir dil tez dhadakta hai aur kaam mein galtiyan hone lagti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se social reaction aur self-image impact ko relationally mirror karna.
text: Mazaak ka asar sirf us pal tak nahi rehta, woh tumhari image aur kaam dono par bojh banke chipak jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Main ab painkiller pe chal raha hoon aur bas dikhata hoon sab theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se rooted single question puchkar core pressure ko naam dena.
text: Jab tum sab theek dikhate ho, us waqt tum sabse zyada kis cheez ko bachane ki koshish kar rahe hote ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apna kamzor tag bachane ki koshish karta hoon. Dar lagta hai credibility down ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role-image pressure mirror karke insight ke liye bridge banana.
text: Tum dard se jyada apni image ko girne se bachane ki duty mein atke hue ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi mein thak gaya hoon. Body chillati rehti hai par main ignore karta rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 context mein judged hone aur help maangne ki sharm reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tumhare andar ek sharm bhi baithi hai ki agar tumne dard ko maana, toh log tumhe serious nahi lenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, yahi lagta hai. Isliye doctor ke saamne bhi poori baat nahi bolta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Metro-work identity pressure ko normalize karke worth ko symptoms se alag karna.
text: Jahan kaam ki image pe value tikti ho, wahan aisa pressure feel karna bahut common hai. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam capable ho, bas load bohot din se body pe gir raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke halka lag raha hai. Pehli baar lag raha hai koi meri takleef ko fake nahi keh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke professional world ka common pattern share karke isolation kam karna.
text: Work-pressure roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki image crack hone ka darr rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo office ke beech mein practical ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty-compatible 3 short options dena jo 10 min se kam aur zero extra burden hon.
text: Teen micro options: (1) Trigger ke turant baad 6 slow exhale. (2) Aankhon ki jalan pe 60-second screen break aur palkein bandh. (3) Notes app mein 1 line: pressure kab spike hua.

speaker: Seeker
text: Screen break aur exhale dono doable hain. Yeh office flow tode bina ho sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko immediate action sequence mein convert karna.
text: Pehle cursor side pe karo aur palkein 20 second bandh karo. Phir 6 baar 4-in 6-out breathing karo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Abhi karke dekha, pressure kam laga. Jalan poori gayi nahi par dimaag halka hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Health category ka structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Jab social humiliation aur performance pressure ek saath ho, body migraine-jaisa load aur eye strain se react karti hai. Yeh personal failure nahi, overload pattern hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Overload pattern samajh aaya toh guilt kam hua. Main khud ko hi blame kar raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se fear-to-clarity shift mirror karke control reinforce karna.
text: Pehle tumhe lagta tha sab tumhari kami hai, ab tum trigger pattern ko pakad rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thoda control feel ho raha hai. Trigger ke baad recovery fast lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do extra low-effort options dena jo workday mein seamlessly fit hon.
text: Do aur quick add-ons: (1) Lunch ke baad 90-sec neck roll slow pace. (2) Trigger ke baad fixed line bolo: '2 min mein join karta hoon'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Fixed line useful rahegi. Isse panic mein bhi without explain kiye pause mil jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se social setting mein self-protection strategy mirror karna.
text: Tumne logon ke beech apne liye ek respectful pause ka tareeka bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab settled feel ho raha hai. Pehle jitna helpless lagta tha utna nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty aur self-regulation ke balance ko mirror karna.
text: Tum kaam ki zimmedari nibhaate hue bhi apne tan ko ignore nahi kar rahe, yahi sustainable raasta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj kaafi. Main is flow ko kal se bhi follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se opening body distress se calm state tak ki arc mirror karke close dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hatheliyon talwon mein jalan itni badh gayi hai ki dukan pe baithna mushkil ho jata hai. Sharir mein jhanjhanahat aur bhari thakan rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter

text: Hatheliyon aur talwon ki yeh jalan tumhara din chalana hi kathin bana rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, jhanjhanahat kabhi haath mein, kabhi pair mein shift hoti rehti hai. Reports normal bolkar sab mujhe natak keh dete hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se dusron ke reaction aur emotional चोट ka relational mirror dena.
text: Jab tum natak sunte ho, dard ke saath beizzati ka bojh bhi chipak jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur family head hone ke chakkar mein main chup rehta hoon. Bolta hoon sab sambhal lunga, par body saath nahi de rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-role mirror karke hidden burden ko surface karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Dukan pe baithna dushwar ho gaya toh darr lagta hai ghar ka kharcha kaise chalega.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur jab natak bolte hain na, tab bolne ka mann hi nahi karta. Bas chup chap kaam karta rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter

text: Jab tum chup ho jaate ho, us pal tum kis cheez ko bachane ki koshish kar rahe hote ho?

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Yeh sunke halka laga. Pehli baar lag raha hai mujhe samjha gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo dukan sambhalte hue kar sakoon?

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
